notes: Reviewed all 64 events in order (52 filings incl. boilerplate Item 5.02/5.07/8.01 8-Ks with no prose, plus 12 transcripts) and all 9 fiscal.ai KPIs.

KPI rewrites: "New ... Shacks Opened" labels rewritten to *_shack_development (banned state word "opened" removed); "Total Price/Mix Increase" -> price_mix and "Total Traffic Increase" -> guest_traffic (state word "increase" removed); "Shack-Level Operating Profit" -> restaurant_level_profit (company renamed the measure: "Restaurant-level profit ... formerly referred to as Shack-level operating profit"); "Total Same-Shack Sales" -> same_shack_sales (company brand form of same_store_sales).

Skipped as vague/bare-category: "broader macroeconomic pressures" (bare macro), "competition for guests" (bare competition), "premium positioning", "changes in economic conditions", reputation damage, ESG/sustainability focus, long-term lease risk, alcohol-sale risk, class-action risk, new-shack "honeymoon" effect (metaphor), movie tie-in marketing (vague), corporate-culture risk, new-market expansion risk (vague), site availability (boilerplate).

Skipped as duplicates of kept names: delivery_sales (inside digital_sales quote), labor_scheduling (labor_productivity), construction cost environment (shack_build_cost + inflation), media_investment (advertising_spend), items_per_check (average_check), average_unit_volume (average_weekly_sales), guest_wait_time (speed_of_service), in_shack_traffic (guest_traffic), shack_sales (system_wide_sales/same_shack_sales).
Plain result metrics (revenue, eps, net income, adjusted EBITDA) kept only as *_guidance per earnings convention; press releases never mention consensus, so no *_surprise names were coined.
pre_opening_costs kept as a standard restaurant P&L line item (us-gaap:PreOpeningCosts) despite containing "opening" — it is a stable metric phrase, not a state word.

Item 4.02 non-reliance 8-Ks (2024-02-15/2024-02-26) grounded financial_restatement via the Q4-2023 press release text; Item 5.02-only 8-Ks had no prose, so ceo_succession is grounded in the Q2-2024 transcript instead.
